name: Dark Editorial Rain
summary: Premium dark landing with large editorial typography, glassy cards, muted lavender/cyan accents, and animated rain-like background lines.

visual_traits.background: Very dark black/purple gradient with atmospheric animated lines
visual_traits.typography: Huge editorial hero, tight tracking, strong contrast
visual_traits.cards: Rounded glassmorphism cards with subtle borders and shadow
visual_traits.motion: Soft animated rain/streaks in the background
visual_traits.density: Medium density, premium spacing, breathing room

layout_traits.hero: Centered giant headline + concise supporting paragraph
layout_traits.navigation: Simple top nav with small links and one pill CTA

dos: Prefer dark cards over flat sections
donts: Do not add bright neon everywhere
Do not break the calm premium tone
notes: Good default style when Sebastian wants something that feels premium, futuristic, dark, and polished.
